case_title: JOSE AGUILAR ET AL VS. LAWRENCE UM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00). SERVED MAR-05-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UM, LAWRENCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JOSE AGUILAR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HOANG THO GIANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAWRENCE UM IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER TED KIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,680.00 FILED BY AGUILAR, JOSE GIANG, HOANG THO AS TO DEFENDANT UM, LAWRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED MAR-05-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UM, LAWRENCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-19-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, JOSE GIANG, HOANG THO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UM, LAWRENCE PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO GIVE 30 DAYS NOTICE BEFORE VACATING UNIT SO DEFENDANT ENTITLED TO NEXT MONTH'S RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2020 - JUDGMENT.
